message.content:
# Architecture Plan

## File Structure
```
SnakeGame/
├── Main.java
├── GamePanel.java
├── Snake.java
├── Food.java
├── Database.java
├── SoundManager.java
├── HighScorePanel.java
└── GameConfig.java
```

## Module Purposes
- Main.java — JFrame entry point
- GamePanel.java — Game loop, rendering
- Snake.java — Snake entity, collision
- Food.java — Food spawning
- Database.java — SQLite JDBC scores
- SoundManager.java — WAV audio
- HighScorePanel.java — Top 10 JTable
- GameConfig.java — Constants

## Dependencies
- org.xerial:sqlite-jdbc:3.43.0.0
- Java 17+ stdlib

## Database Schema
```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS high_scores (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    player TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Player',
    score INTEGER NOT NULL,
    played_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
```

GOAL_ACHIEVED
